task_completion.description: Verify that a facility record for Westside Cold Storage was created with the correct address and phone number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a CAMEO Data Manager screen showing a facility record named 'Westside Cold Storage' with the address '800 Freezer Lane, Denver, CO 80204' and phone number '(303) 555-0199'.

task_completion.description: Verify that an incident was logged for Anhydrous Ammonia on the correct date and time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an incident record in CAMEO Data Manager showing the chemical 'Anhydrous Ammonia' (or CAS 7664-41-7) and the incident date/time as '01/15/2025' at '08:30'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the incident details (release amount, cause, description, and corrective action) are correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the incident record showing a release amount of '150 lbs' to the air, cause as 'equipment failure', description including 'Forklift impact to external refrigeration pipe', and corrective action including 'Area evacuated; valve manually closed'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the incident is properly linked to the Westside Cold Storage facility.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for visual confirmation within the incident record or facility record that the Anhydrous Ammonia incident is explicitly associated with 'Westside Cold Storage'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the incident report was generated and saved as a PDF to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file explorer window showing 'Westside_Incident_Report.pdf' located in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\', or a save dialog confirming this exact file path, or a PDF viewer displaying the generated CAMEO report.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the CAMEO Data Manager graphical user interface to create the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing active interaction with the CAMEO Data Manager application (e.g., filling out forms, clicking buttons, navigating menus) rather than using scripts or database injection.

integrity.description: Ensure the PDF report was generated using the application's built-in reporting tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for CAMEO's print or report generation dialogs, or ensure the final PDF contains the standard formatting of a CAMEO Data Manager incident report, rather than being a blank or manually created text file renamed to .pdf.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that there are no terminal or PowerShell windows showing commands like 'echo' or 'New-Item' being used to create fake PDF files or dummy records.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The incident involves anhydrous ammonia (CAS 7664-41-7). The release amount is 150 lbs, which is above the EPCRA reportable quantity threshold. The incident date is 01/15/2025 at 08:30. The description must include the keyword 'Forklift'. The facility name is 'Westside Cold Storage'.
